final:
module master_slave_d_latch (
    input wire D,
    input wire E,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Qn
);

reg slave;

always @(D or E) begin
    if (E) begin
        slave = D; // Capture D when E is high
    end
end

always @(slave or E) begin
    if (!E) begin
        Q = slave;  // Output Q follows slave when E is low
        Qn = ~slave; // Output Qn is the complement of slave
    end
end

endmodule
